projects.title: S3 Library Platform
projects.description: End-to-end SaaS platform built from a real-world problem
projects.summary: Built a multi-tenant SaaS system after identifying inefficiencies in real library operations. Designed subscriptions, seat allocation, and admin workflows. Validated through direct interaction with libraries, uncovering trust barriers and adoption challenges. Paused after validation, gaining strong insights into product-market fit and real-world system behavior.

projects.title: TypeFromImage
projects.description: Prototype-first typing system with custom content input
projects.summary: Built a typing system allowing users to practice with custom content (images/text). Identified gap in existing tools. Added real-time input handling and piano-like audio feedback for engagement. Focused on validating idea before scaling.

projects.title: Real-Time Chat + Multiplayer System
projects.description: Real-time communication platform with synchronized multiplayer games
projects.summary: Built a real-time system with chat and multiplayer games (Ludo + Chase). Focused on event-driven architecture, state synchronization, and low-latency communication. Solved challenges in multi-user coordination and real-time state consistency across clients.

projects.title: WiFi-Controlled RC Car
projects.description: IoT-based real-time control system using ESP8266
projects.summary: Upgrading Bluetooth RC car to WiFi-based system. Focused on network communication, firmware structure, and real-time control logic for IoT systems.

projects.title: Multi-Mode Bluetooth RC Car
projects.description: Embedded system with multiple control modes
projects.summary: Built RC car with manual, obstacle avoidance, and line-following modes. Integrated sensors, motor drivers, and real-time control logic.

projects.title: Small IoT and Embedded Experiments
projects.description: Mini projects exploring sensors and embedded systems
projects.summary: Built small experiments around sensor interfacing, GPIO control, and LED automation. Focused on debugging, circuit design, and strengthening embedded fundamentals through isolated, practical builds.

projects.title: Habiqua Room Rental System
projects.description: SaaS system design for rental operations
projects.summary: Designed system for property listing, booking, and pricing logic. Focused on workflows, roles, and scalable architecture.

projects.title: Flask Authentication System
projects.summary: Implemented login and logout functionality using Flask with session handling and database integration. Strengthened understanding of backend request handling and authentication flows.

projects.title: Expense Tracker Web App
projects.description: Web app for tracking expenses and reports
projects.summary: Built an expense tracking system with CRUD operations and MySQL database. Implemented reporting features to help users manage budgets and analyze spending patterns.

projects.title: Sudoku Solver
projects.description: Backtracking algorithm to solve Sudoku puzzles
projects.summary: Implemented a recursive backtracking algorithm to solve Sudoku efficiently. Focused on constraint validation and optimizing search paths for better performance.

projects.title: N-Queens Solver
projects.summary: Developed a recursive solution enforcing row, column, and diagonal constraints. Strengthened understanding of recursion, optimization, and algorithm design techniques.

projects.title: Rat in a Maze Solver
projects.summary: Built a pathfinding algorithm using recursion and constraint checking. Improved logical thinking, boundary validation, and optimization techniques in algorithm design.

projects.title: Mars Mission Graphics Program
projects.summary: Created a graphical simulation using C to visualize motion and trajectory. Helped understand animation basics, rendering logic, and fundamentals of computer graphics.
